steps.title: Identify the type of statement needed
steps.content: The question requires a generalization about how word order is employed—a statement about actual patterns of word order usage across languages, not about classification methodology. The data shows 87% of languages are SVO or SOV, both of which place the subject first.

steps.title: Apply to identify the best choice
steps.content:
D directly generalizes about word order employment: the majority of languages place the subject before the verb and object, a claim supported by the 87% data.

The other choices discuss classification methodology or provide a definition rather than state a pattern.

This confirms D is correct.
